title: Reviewed achievement and collection route seed
assumptions: Reviewed seed describes route-planning structure and source boundaries, not a complete official achievement checklist.
Official achievement and account-achievement endpoints can verify achievement ids and completion state when an ingestion adapter supplies them.
Players must confirm exact collection item names, map availability, and reset state in game before acting.

steps.title: Bloodstone Fen reviewed collection sweep
steps.objective: Review account achievement progress, then batch local collection checks that share Bloodstone Fen travel.
assumptions: Route step is seeded from reviewed source structure; exact in-game collection rows remain player-verified.

steps.title: Ember Bay reviewed daily checkpoint
steps.objective: Schedule one short daily-gated collection or currency checkpoint after confirming current reset state.
assumptions: Daily label is a planning constraint and not a guarantee that the step is available right now.

steps.title: Bitterfrost Frontier reviewed gathering loop
steps.objective: Group cold-region account progress checks into one route block before moving to another Living World map.
assumptions: Specific collection target names are intentionally omitted until official achievement details are ingested.

steps.title: Dragonfall reviewed group checkpoint
steps.objective: Reserve a group-content window only when the player opts into group/meta planning.
assumptions: Group event timing, squad availability, and exact objective state must be confirmed outside GW2Radar.

steps.title: Fractal reviewed collection checkpoint
steps.objective: Check whether the next collection blocker belongs in a short fractal session or should be postponed.
assumptions: Fractal tier, instability, role readiness, and party expectations are outside the seed and must be player-provided.
